nasb.text: Now Laban had two daughters; the name of the older was Leah, and the name of the younger was Rachel.

esv.text: Now Laban had two daughters. The name of the older was Leah, and the name of the younger was Rachel.

cnv.text: 拉班有兩個女兒；大的名叫利亞，小的名叫拉結。

ccb.text: 拉班有两个女儿，大的叫利亚，小的叫拉结。

csbs.text: 拉班有两个女儿，大的名叫莉亚，小的名叫瑞秋。
